task_completion.description: Replace hardcoded upstream URL with the environment variable in the Nginx configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing an Nginx configuration file (e.g., default.conf.template) where the proxy_pass directive uses the variable ${BACKEND_URL}.

task_completion.description: Pass BACKEND_URL environment variable to the proxy service in docker-compose.yml
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing docker-compose.yml with 'BACKEND_URL=http://backend:8080' (or equivalent YAML syntax) added to the 'environment' section of the proxy service.

task_completion.description: Mount the Nginx configuration as a template in /etc/nginx/templates/
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing docker-compose.yml with a volume mount mapping a local configuration file to a path inside '/etc/nginx/templates/' for the proxy service.

task_completion.description: Restart the Docker containers to apply the new configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'docker-compose up -d', 'docker compose up -d', or 'docker-compose restart' with output indicating the proxy container was recreated or restarted.

task_completion.description: Verify the setup by running curl http://localhost
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'curl http://localhost' (or similar curl command to the proxy) and returning a successful HTTP response from the backend service.

integrity.description: Files were genuinely edited rather than just printing the expected final state
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of a text editor interface (like nano, vim, or VS Code) or valid shell commands (like sed, echo) modifying the files in /home/ga/proxy-refactor/.
Standard Docker Compose output showing container creation/starting steps, rather than manually typed or echoed fake success messages.

integrity.description: The curl verification returned a genuine response from the backend container
integrity.visual_evidence: The output of the curl command should look like a real HTTP response or backend application output (e.g., traefik/whoami output showing Hostname, IP, etc.), not a manually typed string.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/proxy-refactor. The environment variable to be injected is exactly BACKEND_URL. In the docker-compose.yml, the proxy service must have BACKEND_URL=http://backend:8080 in its environment section, and a volume mount pointing to a file inside /etc/nginx/templates/ (this is the official Nginx image path for template substitution).
